questions.questionText: 昨夜は酔って騒いで、醜い<u>姿</u>をさらしたらしい。
questions.explanation: The correct reading of the kanji 姿 is すがた (sugata), meaning figure or appearance.

questions.questionText: 富士山は、静岡県と山梨県に＿＿＿＿＿います。
questions.explanation: またがる (matagaru) means to span or extend over. Mount Fuji spans across Shizuoka and Yamanashi prefectures.

questions.questionText: このくらいの簡単な計算なら、電卓を使う＿＿＿＿＿。
questions.explanation: 〜までもない (made mo nai) means 'there is no need to ~'. For such simple calculations, there is no need to use a calculator.
